choices.name: WTR_Agreement
choices.choiceText: I wish to waive the restriction of the 48 hour working week, this will allow me to work more than 48 hours per week

choices.name: WTR_Non_Agreement
choices.choiceText: I do not wish to waive the restriction of the 48 hour working week, this will restrict my working week to a maximum of 48 hours

value.stringValue: Medacs Terms of Engagement - H06-v9 Feb 2020

fields.name: TOE_Screen_Text
fields.fieldText:
Terms of Employment

These terms are between Blue Arrow Limited (“The Company”) and:


Full Name: {!Get_Candidate.Name}


Signature: {!Signature}


You are employed by the Company as one of its Flexible Employees and will be assigned by it to provide services to the Company’s Clients from time to time. The Flexible Employee Handbook, gives details of the terms and conditions upon which you are employed by the Company, as at the date of your first assignment. It contains the initial employment particulars required by the Employment Rights Act 1996 s1 or Employment Rights Order (Northern Ireland) 1996 as applicable. Further relevant provisions are included in the Flexible Employee Handbook which can be viewed by clicking here, this document will also be emailed to you on completion of this form.


Your terms and conditions of employment are contained in the application form completed by you, and in the Flexible Employee Handbook except where it is stated therein that certain provisions are not contractual. Those documents constitute the entire contract between you and the Company. There are no collective agreements which affect your terms and conditions of employment unless you are being employed for driving assignments in which case you will be provided with details of the workforce agreement in place.


I acknowledge I have received a copy of the Flexible Employee Handbook, I have read, understood and agree to be bound by all the terms contained in it. By my accepting hereof I authorise the Company to make deductions from salary or final payments due to me as specified herein. I confirm that in connection with any rights I may be entitled to under the AWR (“AWR” means the Agency Workers Regulations 2010 or the Agency Workers Regulations (Northern Ireland) 2011 as applicable) I have provided the Company with a full and accurate employment history.

fields.name: TOE_Agreement
fields.fieldText: Please confirm you agree to the terms above:

fields.name: TOE_Screen_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Terms of Employment

These terms are between Medacs Healthcare, a trading name of Medacs Healthcare PLC (“The Company”) and:


Full Name: {!Get_Candidate.Name}


You are employed by the Company as one of its Flexible Employees and will be assigned by it to provide services to the Company’s Clients from time to time. The Nursing Handbook, gives details of the terms and conditions upon which you are employed by the Company, as of the date of your first assignment. It contains the initial employment particulars required by the Employment Rights Act 1996 s1 or Employment Rights Order (Northern Ireland) 1996 as applicable. Further relevant provisions are included in the Nursing Handbook which can be viewed by clicking here, this document will also be emailed to you on completion of this form.


Your terms and conditions of employment are contained in the application form completed by you, and in the Nursing Handbook except where it is stated therein that certain provisions are not contractual. Those documents constitute the entire contract between you and the Company. There are no collective agreements which affect your terms and conditions of employment unless you are being employed for driving assignments in which case you will be provided with details of the workforce agreement in place.


I acknowledge I have received a copy of the Nursing Handbook, I have read, understood and agree to be bound by all the terms contained in it. By my accepting hereof I authorise the Company to make deductions from salary or final payments due to me as specified herein. I confirm that in connection with any rights I may be entitled to under the AWR (“AWR” means the Agency Workers Regulations 2010 or the Agency Workers Regulations (Northern Ireland) 2011 as applicable) I have provided the Company with a full and accurate employment history.

fields.name: TOE_Agreement_0
fields.fieldText: Please confirm you agree to the terms above:

fields.name: TOE_Screen_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Terms of Employment

These terms are between SRG (“The Company”) and:


Full Name: {!Get_Candidate.Name}


You are employed by the Company as one of its Flexible Employees and will be assigned by it to provide services to the Company’s Clients from time to time. The SRG Employee Handbook, gives details of the terms and conditions upon which you are employed by the Company, as of the date of your first assignment. It contains the initial employment particulars required by the Employment Rights Act 1996 s1 or Employment Rights Order (Northern Ireland) 1996 as applicable. Further relevant provisions are included in the SRG Employee Handbook which can be viewed by clicking here, this document will also be emailed to you on completion of this form.


Your terms and conditions of employment are contained in the application form completed by you, and in the SRG Employee Handbook except where it is stated therein that certain provisions are not contractual. Those documents constitute the entire contract between you and the Company. There are no collective agreements which affect your terms and conditions of employment unless you are being employed for driving assignments in which case you will be provided with details of the workforce agreement in place.


I acknowledge I have received a copy of the SRG Employee Handbook, I have read, understood and agree to be bound by all the terms contained in it. By my accepting hereof I authorise the Company to make deductions from salary or final payments due to me as specified herein. I confirm that in connection with any rights I may be entitled to under the AWR (“AWR” means the Agency Workers Regulations 2010 or the Agency Workers Regulations (Northern Ireland) 2011 as applicable) I have provided the Company with a full and accurate employment history.

fields.name: TOE_Agreement_0_0
fields.fieldText: Please confirm you agree to the terms above:

fields.name: TOE_Screen_Text_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Terms of Employment

These terms are between Tate (“The Company”) and:


Full Name: {!Get_Candidate.Name}


You are employed by the Company as one of its Temporary Employees and will be assigned by it to provide services to the Company’s Clients from time to time. The Tate Employee Handbook, gives details of the terms and conditions upon which you are employed by the Company, as of the date of your first assignment. It contains the initial employment particulars required by the Employment Rights Act 1996 s1 or Employment Rights Order (Northern Ireland) 1996 as applicable. Further relevant provisions are included in the Tate Employee Handbook which can be viewed by clicking here, this document will also be emailed to you on completion of this form.


Your terms and conditions of employment are contained in the application form completed by you, and in the Tate Employee Handbook except where it is stated therein that certain provisions are not contractual. Those documents constitute the entire contract between you and the Company. There are no collective agreements which affect your terms and conditions of employment unless you are being employed for driving assignments in which case you will be provided with details of the workforce agreement in place.


I acknowledge I have received a copy of the Tate Employee Handbook, I have read, understood and agree to be bound by all the terms contained in it. By my accepting hereof I authorise the Company to make deductions from salary or final payments due to me as specified herein. I confirm that in connection with any rights I may be entitled to under the AWR (“AWR” means the Agency Workers Regulations 2010 or the Agency Workers Regulations (Northern Ireland) 2011 as applicable) I have provided the Company with a full and accurate employment history.

fields.name: TOE_Agreement_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Please confirm you agree to the terms above:

textTemplates.name: Signature
textTemplates.text: {!Get_Candidate.Name}﻿

textTemplates.name: TOE_Text
textTemplates.text:
To: {!Get_Candidate.Email} CC: BCC: Attachment: Blue Arrow FE Handbook BABA-0319-FETOE.pdf Subject: Blue Arrow - Key Information Document Body: Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName},
Thank you for registering with Blue Arrow, attached is a copy of the terms of employment you have recently completed online.
Kind Regards Blue Arrow bluearrow.co.uk
